note: R58 machine-readable intake ledger for the seven branches carrying content genuinely absent from public main, converted from the public R57A branch reconciliation. Every classification below was derived from direct in-lane inspection (git fetch + merge-base + diff against the exact base) — NEVER from branch presence, branch names, or report prose alone. The Avenger referee report is recorded as advisory evidence only (EXTERNAL_RESEARCH), per the standing coordinator memory that referee passes are never authority and never a substitute for local reproduction.

law.branch_presence_is_not_results: A branch existing (or a report describing it) proves nothing about behavior; results require landed SHA + behavioral test through the governed intake path.
law.classification_requires_inspection: Each entry records the executed commands and measured numbers its classification rests on.
law.referee_is_advisory: Kimi per-file breakdowns are preserved as EXTERNAL_RESEARCH advisory context, not adopted as verified classifications.

capture.method: git fetch origin <branch>; git merge-base <branch> <base>; git rev-list --count for ahead/behind; git diff --name-only merge-base..branch | xargs git diff --stat <base> <branch> -- for content still unique vs main; targeted git show/grep for content-class evidence.

source_survey.note: Prune/delete decisions for the 123 belong to Sam 1/owner and are OUT of this ledger's scope; this ledger classifies only the seven unique-content branches. The referee's prunable count is advisory (EXTERNAL_RESEARCH), not re-verified here.

entries.rationale: The only branch carrying actual AGRE engine code (17.4KB v11 + 18.3KB v14 + 4.2KB arc_agi harness, verified via git ls-tree -l). Its own committed same-day report states 'Neither triggers WIN.' — an honest negative baseline, verified by direct grep of the committed report blob. Intake as research candidate preserves the code AND its negative result together; adopting any success claim from it is prohibited (none exists).
evidence: VERIFIED: git ls-tree -l origin/skunkworks/arc3-agre engines/ → agre_v11.py 17372B, agre_v14.py 18327B, arc_agi.py 4158B, report 5344B (real code, not stubs — contrast: main's docs/skunkworks/agre_v2/*.py are 103–469B self-referential stubs per referee §3)

VERIFIED: git show origin/skunkworks/arc3-agre:docs/AGRE_FINAL_REPORT_COMPLETE.md | grep → '**Neither triggers WIN.**' present; report attributes non-completion to LS20 corridor structure and TU93 step limit
VERIFIED: git diff feb11bf..branch restricted to touched files → 4 files, +1092, none present on main
entries.referee_advisory: EXTERNAL_RESEARCH (Kimi §3): engines are vision+LLM class, not the claimed source-first v2; local mock wrapper only, no API calls in repo. Not independently re-derived here.

unique_vs_main.file_list_note: 31 files spanning convergence/* (12 reports/specs + 7 TS modules), packages/immune/*, and 4 root reports; full list reproducible via the recorded method.

entries.rationale: This is draft PR #121's head. Mixed-value content that must be intaken file-by-file through review, never blind-merged: part of its immune content already reached main via the governed R55 extraction (main's packages/immune/docs/PROVENANCE.md cites extraction commit 8a110737, verified an ancestor of this head), while other files are candidates or rejects. ADAPT = selective per-file intake only, each file through its own evidence gate.
evidence: VERIFIED: git rev-parse origin/convergence/kimi-overnight → 70639ac01 (equals draft PR #121 head cited in main's provenance dispute)
VERIFIED: git merge-base --is-ancestor 8a1107379ca7… origin/convergence/kimi-overnight → true (the immune extraction source is an ancestor of this branch)
VERIFIED: diff vs feb11bf restricted to its 31 touched files → +7189/−235 still unique (the landed immune salvage accounts for the difference from the branch's raw +8394)
entries.referee_advisory: EXTERNAL_RESEARCH (Kimi §4): per-file breakdown 11 ALREADY_INTEGRATED · 5 RESEARCH_CANDIDATE · 3 ADAPT · 12 REJECT; 30/30 review threads unresolved; REJECT highlights include parallel council and fabricated-claim reports. Advisory only — per-file adoption requires per-file evidence at intake time.

per_file_exception.research/arc-benchmark/ARC_BENCHMARK_REP: MISSING_EVIDENCE — the report's results JSON was never shipped on any branch (task inputs arc_tasks.json present, outputs absent); the report may not be intaken as evidence of anything until its results artifact exists.

entries.rationale: Four internally consistent pre-Nebius rehearsal artifacts (hostile-scenario inputs + evidence + report) worth preserving as research; one file carries a results claim without its results artifact and is pinned MISSING_EVIDENCE.
evidence: VERIFIED: diff vs feb11bf restricted to its 5 touched files → +1169, all absent from main
VERIFIED: branch tree research/arc-benchmark/ contains only ARC_BENCHMARK_REPORT.md + arc_tasks.json — no results JSON
entries.referee_advisory: EXTERNAL_RESEARCH (Kimi §4): 4 RESEARCH_CANDIDATE · 1 MISSING_EVIDENCE; rehearsal receipts judged internally consistent with the honest verdict 'REFUSAL-CAPABLE but NOT GLYPH-RELIABLE'.

narrow_extraction.detail: Main's line 7 wrongly labels extraction commit 8a1107379ca7… as 'draft PR #121 head'; the branch carries the accurate wording: extracted from commit 8a110737 (the MERGE_BRIEF_IMMUNE_SYSTEM.md extraction-source commit, NOT PR #121's head; the PR's head is 70639ac01dcb). Apply exactly this one-line accuracy fix; owner of the apply/qualify step is Sam 1 per ROUND_DIRECTIVE R58 item 3.
narrow_extraction.verified_against: git rev-parse origin/convergence/kimi-overnight → 70639ac01… confirms 8a110737 is NOT the head; merge-base --is-ancestor confirms it IS an ancestor (extraction-source).

entries.rationale: Everything else still differing on this branch is OLDER than main (the −122 side: main's PROVENANCE now carries the fuller R55.1–R55.3 behavioral-adaptation record this branch predates; seed/spatial files likewise superseded). The single live value is the one-line donor-accuracy correction — narrow extraction, not branch merge.
evidence: VERIFIED: git diff feb11bf..branch -- packages/immune/docs/PROVENANCE.md → main side (−) contains the richer R55.1–R55.3 adaptation record; branch side (+) contains the accurate extraction-commit line absent from main
VERIFIED: main line 7 says 'head `8a110737…`' (wrong); branch line 7 says extraction-source ≠ head, head = 70639ac01dcb (right)
entries.referee_advisory: EXTERNAL_RESEARCH (Kimi §2): flagged as '1-line donor-accuracy fix — cherry-pick'. Independently re-verified here at line level.

narrow_extraction.detail: Single content-frozen lane handoff receipt (schema aukora-overnight-handoff-v1) recording the Sam 3 overnight effect-protocol mission state. Explicitly self-limiting: grantsAuthority:false, durabilityClaim 'NONE end-to-end'. Intake = verbatim copy into main's docs/overnight tree for continuity preservation; no behavior, no claims adopted.

entries.rationale: Archival receipt in this lane's own continuity ownership; preserving it on main prevents capability-history loss; nothing in it asserts results.
evidence: VERIFIED: only 1 unique file (+46) vs main; git show of the file confirms handoff-receipt schema with grantsAuthority:false and an honest incomplete-mission status

narrow_extraction.detail: The only additive unique file is the Sam 2 overnight handoff receipt. trustedStateStore.ts differs BEHIND main (+21/−170 against main → main's version is the fuller, newer one; branch code superseded) and package-lock drift is historical. Intake = the receipt only.

entries.rationale: Trusted-state code from this line landed on main through governed rounds; the branch remainder is one archival receipt plus superseded code. Archive the receipt, adopt no code.
evidence: VERIFIED: unique remainder is 3 files (+49/−182); per-file diff of trustedStateStore.ts vs main → 21 added / 170 removed lines relative to main, i.e. the branch predates main's version
VERIFIED: sam2 HANDOFF.json absent from main (status A in name-status diff)

narrow_extraction.detail: The continuity MD carries ~24 addendum lines absent from main's copy. apps/brain/src/index.ts differs only by LACKING main's receiptBridge re-export (branch predates it — superseded, adopt nothing). Intake = the MD addendum only.

entries.rationale: Effect-event code from this line already landed on main; unique remainder is a continuity-document addendum (this lane's preservation duty) plus one superseded code line.
evidence: VERIFIED: unique remainder is 2 files (+24/−1); index.ts delta vs main is exactly the absence of `export * from './receiptBridge.js'` (main has it, branch does not → branch older)
VERIFIED: continuity MD addendum absent from main's copy of the same path

verification_scope.offline_gate_proves: structure, classification vocabulary, per-classification required-evidence fields, epistemic labeling, and internal consistency ONLY
verification_scope.external_truth_rests_on: the recorded evidence commands, each re-executable against the pinned branch heads and base; a semantically wrong classification inside valid vocabulary can only be caught by re-executing that evidence, which the R58 Avengers audit independently did for 3 of 7 entries
verification_scope.v2_hardening: R59 (M3 repair-forward): per-classification required fields — ALREADY_INTEGRATED requires landed_reference (hex SHA on main); ADAPT requires narrow_extraction OR an explicit per-file intake rationale; REJECT requires reject_grounds and carries no extraction; entry-level MISSING_EVIDENCE requires missing_artifact; every evidence line must carry an epistemic prefix (VERIFIED/FALSIFIED/UNPROVEN/STALE/EXTERNAL_RESEARCH/INFERENCE).
